text: Problem 13.12* Draw the node graph corresponding to the edge graph in figure 13.15b.
Problem 13.13 For a general undirected graph, describe how the adjacency matrix of the node graph relates to the adjacency matrix of the corresponding edge graph.

Problem 13.14* Design a layer that updates a node embedding $\mathbf{h}\_{m}$ based on its neighboring node embeddings $\lbrace \mathbf{h}\_{m}\rbrace\_{m\in\mathrm{ne}[n]}$ and neighboring edge embeddings $\lbrace \mathbf{e}\_{m}\rbrace\_{m\in\mathrm{ne}[n]}$. You should consider the possibility that the edge embeddings are not the same size as the node embeddings.
